labs.frequency: within 2-4 weeks of initiation or dose escalation
labs.clinicalContext: Monitor for transient decrease in eGFR or increase in serum creatinine

labs.frequency: within 2-4 weeks of initiation or dose escalation
labs.clinicalContext: Monitor for hyperkalemia which can be managed with various strategies

labRequirements.sourceSnippet: Monitor for changes in BP, serum creatinine and serum potassium within 2-4 weeks of ACEi/ARB initiation or dose escalation since RAS blockade can induce a transient decrease in the eGFR or a transient increase in serum creatinine and/or potassium. Patients should be maintained on ACEi or ARB unless serum creatinine rises by more than 30% within 4 weeks of initiation or dose escalation.

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease

labs.frequency: at 1 month and every 4 months thereafter
labs.clinicalContext: Monitor potassium due to risk of hyperkalemia with MRA therapy

labRequirements.sourceSnippet: Initiate finerenone at 10 mg for patients with eGFR <60 ml/min/1.73 m² or 20 mg for patients with eGFR ≥60 mL/min/1.73m² and serum potassium ≤4.8 mmol/L. Monitor potassium at 1 month and every 4 months thereafter. Continue with current dose if serum potassium is 4.9-5.5 mmol/L. If serum potassium is >5.5 mmol/L, hold finerenone and adjust diet or medications.

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease

labs.clinicalContext: A modest drop in eGFR (≤30%) should not prompt discontinuation

labRequirements.sourceSnippet: SGLT2i should be initiated in patients with T2D, CKD and eGFR ≥20 ml/min/1.73 m². Once an SGLT2i is initiated, it is reasonable to continue an SGLT2i even if the eGFR falls below 20 ml/min per 1.73 m², unless it is not tolerated or kidney replacement therapy is initiated. A modest drop in eGFR (≤30%) after SGLT2i administration should not prompt discontinuation of therapy.

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease
